title: Double Dash
description:
A small collection of mods used for Double Dash!!
This includes some optional performance mods.
body:
This is a collection of mods to play Double Dash!!. There are some mods included that are not strictly required which help with performance and enable the use of shaders. 

Required Mods:
- Simple Voice Chat

See https://wiki.calathea.dev for more information.

[Join our Discord server to join us in a game!](https://discord.gg/fwmRpUGtsw)
